code: /** Build engine rules URL, optionally focused on one Azure component. */export function engineRulesUrl(component){if(!component)return'/engine';return"/engine?component=".concat(encodeURIComponent(component));}/** DOM id for a component section on the engine config page. */export function engineComponentSectionId(component){const slug=String(component||'').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,'');return"engine-component-".concat(slug||'all');}
